name: Thomas Ayurveda
tagline: Chiropractic meets Ayurveda in Sonoma County
seoDescription: Dr. Helen Thomas, DC blends chiropractic and Ayurvedic medicine in Santa Rosa — 40+ years of holistic care for pain, allergies, digestion, and stress.

hero.heading: Forty Years of Healing, East Meets West
hero.subheading: Dr. Helen Thomas, DC pairs chiropractic with Ayurvedic medicine she studied under Deepak Chopra and master physicians in Pune, India.

highlights: Doctor of Chiropractic, Palmer College graduate (1982)
Studied with Deepak Chopra, Vasant Lad & Dr. Narendra Pendse, MD
Author of "Ayurveda: The A-Z Guide to Healing Techniques from Ancient India"

images.heroAlt: Thomas Ayurveda in Santa Rosa, CA

about.heading: About Thomas Ayurveda
body: Dr. Helen Mary Thomas is a California native and longtime Sonoma County resident who has practiced chiropractic since graduating from Palmer College of Chiropractic in 1982. In 1984 she began training as an Ayurvedic physician — one of the first chiropractors to study with Deepak Chopra and Vaidya J.R. Ragu — later completing coursework at Maharishi International University and residencies in Pune and Mumbai, India under her mentor Dr. Narendra Pendse, MD.

Her Santa Rosa clinic synthesizes chiropractic, Ayurveda, NAET allergy elimination, bodywork, and bioenergetics into one holistic, personalized approach. She is also the author of "Ayurveda: The A-Z Guide to Healing Techniques from Ancient India."

services.title: Chiropractic Care
services.description: Gentle, precise adjustments to relieve pain and restore alignment, including Impulse IQ instrument adjusting.

services.title: Ayurvedic Medicine
services.description: Personalized Ayurvedic assessment and therapies rooted in decades of training in India's ancient healing system.

services.title: NAET Allergy Elimination
services.description: Non-invasive allergy and sensitivity treatment to address reactions at their source.

services.title: Digestion & IBS Care
services.description: Ayurvedic treatment for chronic indigestion and IBS to rebuild healthy digestion.

services.title: Zerona Laser Weight Loss
services.description: Cold-laser body-contouring therapy for non-invasive weight loss support.

services.title: Stress Relief Therapy
services.description: Relaxation and stress-relief sessions to calm the nervous system and support whole-body wellness.

items.title: Thomas Ayurveda opened its doors
items.body: Dr. Helen Mary Thomas is a California native and longtime Sonoma County resident who has practiced chiropractic since graduating from Palmer College

items.quote: Dr. Thomas is a healer in every sense of the word and a genuinely kind, caring person who is passionate about the work she does.
items.author: Elaine

items.quote: YES, she is a great doctor. Knowledgeable in her field, honest, transparent and has her patients' interest at heart always!
items.author: Lety Assad

items.a: You'll find us at 2635 Cleveland Ave Ste 2.
Hours can vary — give us a call at +17075277313 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17075277313 — we're glad to help.
